titleStmt.title: SII 17.324: original edition by K. G. Krishnan
No. 324. (A.R. No. 295 of 1904.) KĀḶAHASTI, KALAHASTI TALUK, CHITTOOR DISTRICT.

summary.p: On the north, east and south bases of the central shrine in the Kāḷahastīśvara temple.
This incomplete and damaged record commences with the praśasti, Tirumaṉṉi vaḷara, etc., of the king.

It mentions the names Rājamāṇikka-śeṭṭi, Vallaṅ-kiḻāṉ of Ugumbil in Māṅgāḍunāḍu in Paiyyūr-Iḷaṅgōṭṭam, Tāḻi Nārāyaṇan of Śaṅgattimaṅgalam in Puraṅgarambai and others including variyilīḍu••••śilaṉ Poṟṟēvan in Neḍuṅguṉṟanāḍu in Puliyūr-kōṭṭam in Jayaṅgoṇḍaśōḻa-maṇḍalam.

revisionDesc.change: Further conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)
Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī . tirumaṉṉivaḷara Irunila maṭan=teyum poṟ ceyap pāvaiyuñ cirtaniccelviyun=taṉ perun=teviyarāki Iṉpuṟu neṭutiyalūḻiyu ḷiṭaituṟai nāṭuntuṭarvaṉavelippaṭar vaṉavāciyuñ cuḷḷiccūḻmatiṭ koḷḷippākkaiyum naṇṇaṟ karumuraṇ maṇṇaikkaṭakkamum poru kaṭaliḻat taraicar tammuṭiyum Āṅkavar teviya roṅkeḻil muṭiyum muṉṉavar pakkal
teṉṉavaṉ vaitta cun=tara muṭiyum Intira nārvamu n=teṇṭirai Īḻa maṇṭala muḻuvatum Eṟi paṭaik keraḷaṉ muṟaimayiṟ cūṭuṅ kulataṉamākiya palar pukaḻ muṭiyum ceṅkatirmālaic ceṅkatir velaiyum tol peruṅkāvaṟ palpaḻan=tīvum ceruviṟ ciṉavil Irupattorukāla Araicu kaḷaikaṭṭa paracurāmaṉ melvaruñ cān=timaṟṟivaraṇ karutiyiruttiya cempoṟṟiruttaku muṭiyum payaṅkoṭu paḻimika muyaṅkiyil mutukiṭṭoḷitta jayaciṅkaṉ Aḻapperumpukaḻoṭu piṭiyiraṭṭapāṭi Eḻarai Ilakkamum navanetikkulap perumalaikaḷum vikkiramavirar cakkira koṭṭamum mutar vaṭavallai matura maṇṭalamuṅ kāmiṭai vaḷai nāmaṇaikkoṇaiyum veñcilai virar pañcappaḷḷiyum pācaṭaip paḻana mācuṇitecamum Ayarvilvaṇ kirttiyātinakaravaiyil can=tiraṉṟolkulat tintirarataṉai viḷaiyamaṟkaḷattu kiḷaioṭum piṭittu
kulatanakkuvaiyuṅ kiṭṭaruñ ceṟimuḷai Oṭṭaviṣaiyyamum pūcurarcer nalkocalaināṭu n=tanma pālaṉai vemmuṉaiyaḻittu vaṇṭuṟai colait taṇṭaputtiyum Iraṇacūraṉai muraṇukat tākki tikkaṇak kirtti takkaṇalāṭamuṅ kovin=tacan=tan māviḻin=toṭa taṅkāta cāral vaṅkāḷa tecamum toṭukaṭaṟ caṅkuoṭṭal mahipālanai veñcamaṟ viḷākattu Añcuvittaruḷi Oṇṭiṟal yāṉaiyum peṇṭir paṇṭāramum nittila neṭuṅkaṭal Uttiralāṭamum veṟimalar tīrttat teṟipunaṟ kaṅkaiyum Alaikaṭal naṭuvuṭ palakalañ celutti caṅkirāmavicaiyottuṅka panmanākiya kiṭārattaraiyaṉai vākai(y)yam porukaṭaṟ kumpakkariyoṭu makappaṭutturimaiyiṟ piṟak kiya peruneti piṟakkamum Ārttavanakanakar porttoḻil vācalil viccātirat toraṇamum muy
ttoḷir puṉamaṇipputavamuṅ kanamaṇikkatavamum niṟai cirvicaiyamu ntuṟai nir paṉṉaiyum vaṉamalaiūriṟ ṟonmalai Ūrum Āḻkaṭal Akaḻ cūḻ māyiruṭiṅkamuṅ kalaṅkāvalviṉai Ilaṅkā cokamuṅ kāppuṟu niṟaipunal māpappāḷamuṅ kāvalanpuricai mevilipaṅkamuṅ viḷaip paiyntū ṟuṭai vaḷaippantūṟuṅ kalaiyttakkor pukaḻ talaittakkolamun=titamāvalviṉai mātamaliṅkamuṅ kalāmuṟi [ kaṭun=tiṟal] Ilāmuritecamu(m) n=tenakkalar poḻil mātakkavāramun toṭukaṭaṟ kāvaṟk kaṭumuraṭ kaṭāramum māpporutaṇṭāṟ koṇṭa kopparakecaripanmarāṉa śrīrājentracoḻatevaṟku yāṇṭu [2 10 3] Āvatu jayaṅkoṇṭacoḻa maṇṭalattup perumpāṇappāṭi Āṟṟūr nāṭṭu nakaram mum tirukkāḷattiyāna rājamāṇikka ceṭṭi poṟkāri
paiyyūrk koṭṭattu māṅkāṭu nāṭṭu Ukumpil vallaṅkiḻāna vaḷanāṭṭup puraṅkaram paināṭṭuc caṅkattimaṅkalamuṭaiyān
tāḻi nārāṇaṉum Innāṭṭu vaṇṭāḻai Ikkūṟṟattup perumpeṭukiḻān kūnān veḷānum variyiliṭu jayaṅkoṇṭa coḻamaṇṭalattu puliyūrk koṭṭattu neṭuṅkuṉṟa nāṭṭu cilan poṟṟevanum
coḻamaṇṭalattu yarumoḻiteva vaḷanāṭṭup pālaiyūr nāṭṭup pālaiyūr kiḻavaṉa vanmātanum jayaṅkoṇṭa coḻamaṇṭalattu vallanāṭṭu neṭumpuḷi Uṭaiyān puṉnakar māṇikkamum The inscription is incomplete.
Digital edition of SII 17.324 by converted to DHARMA conventions by Emmanuel Francis.
